note_text:
Patient: 58F presenting with moderate benign prostatic hyperplasia.
Conservative management including antiarrhythmic medication, physical therapy was attempted over approximately 15 weeks without adequate improvement.
Imaging studies confirm findings consistent with benign prostatic hyperplasia.
Referring urology physician requests authorization for turp.
